// src/data/mockData.js

export const DISASTER_ZONES = [
  {
    id: "z1",
    name: "Northern District — Flood Zone Alpha",
    type: "Flood",
    severity: "critical",
    population: 48200,
    affectedCount: 12400,
    coordinates: { x: 22, y: 18 },
    reportedAt: "2025-06-11T04:30:00Z",
    needs: { medical: 85, food: 70, shelter: 90, rescue: 60 },
    resourcesDeployed: 3,
  },
  {
    id: "z2",
    name: "Central Valley — Earthquake Zone",
    type: "Earthquake",
    severity: "high",
    population: 92000,
    affectedCount: 23100,
    coordinates: { x: 48, y: 42 },
    reportedAt: "2025-06-11T02:15:00Z",
    needs: { medical: 95, food: 60, shelter: 75, rescue: 90 },
    resourcesDeployed: 7,
  },
  {
    id: "z3",
    name: "Eastern Hills — Wildfire Zone",
    type: "Wildfire",
    severity: "high",
    population: 31500,
    affectedCount: 8900,
    coordinates: { x: 72, y: 28 },
    reportedAt: "2025-06-11T06:00:00Z",
    needs: { medical: 55, food: 40, shelter: 65, rescue: 45 },
    resourcesDeployed: 5,
  },
  {
    id: "z4",
    name: "Southern Coast — Storm Surge Zone",
    type: "Storm",
    severity: "medium",
    population: 21000,
    affectedCount: 5200,
    coordinates: { x: 35, y: 72 },
    reportedAt: "2025-06-11T08:45:00Z",
    needs: { medical: 35, food: 55, shelter: 50, rescue: 30 },
    resourcesDeployed: 4,
  },
  {
    id: "z5",
    name: "Western Plains — Drought Crisis",
    type: "Drought",
    severity: "low",
    population: 15800,
    affectedCount: 15800,
    coordinates: { x: 12, y: 58 },
    reportedAt: "2025-06-10T18:00:00Z",
    needs: { medical: 20, food: 80, shelter: 10, rescue: 5 },
    resourcesDeployed: 2,
  },
];

export const RESOURCES = [
  {
    id: "r1",
    name: "Medical Unit Alpha",
    type: "medical",
    status: "deployed",
    assignedZone: "z2",
    capacity: 200,
    utilized: 187,
    location: "Central Valley",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T09:10:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r2",
    name: "Rescue Team Bravo",
    type: "rescue",
    status: "deployed",
    assignedZone: "z1",
    capacity: 50,
    utilized: 48,
    location: "Northern District",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T09:05:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r3",
    name: "Food Supply Unit C",
    type: "food",
    status: "in-transit",
    assignedZone: "z1",
    capacity: 5000,
    utilized: 0,
    location: "En route to Northern District",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T09:15:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r4",
    name: "Emergency Shelter Kit D",
    type: "shelter",
    status: "deployed",
    assignedZone: "z2",
    capacity: 800,
    utilized: 620,
    location: "Central Valley",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T08:50:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r5",
    name: "Medical Unit Echo",
    type: "medical",
    status: "standby",
    assignedZone: null,
    capacity: 150,
    utilized: 0,
    location: "Base Camp — Hyderabad",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T07:00:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r6",
    name: "Rescue Team Foxtrot",
    type: "rescue",
    status: "deployed",
    assignedZone: "z2",
    capacity: 40,
    utilized: 38,
    location: "Central Valley",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T09:12:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r7",
    name: "Water Supply Unit G",
    type: "food",
    status: "standby",
    assignedZone: null,
    capacity: 10000,
    utilized: 0,
    location: "Base Camp — Hyderabad",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T06:30:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r8",
    name: "Fire Suppression Team H",
    type: "rescue",
    status: "deployed",
    assignedZone: "z3",
    capacity: 60,
    utilized: 55,
    location: "Eastern Hills",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T09:00:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r9",
    name: "Emergency Shelter Kit I",
    type: "shelter",
    status: "in-transit",
    assignedZone: "z3",
    capacity: 400,
    utilized: 0,
    location: "En route to Eastern Hills",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T09:18:00Z",
  },
  {
    id: "r10",
    name: "Medical Unit Juliet",
    type: "medical",
    status: "deployed",
    assignedZone: "z4",
    capacity: 100,
    utilized: 62,
    location: "Southern Coast",
    lastUpdate: "2025-06-11T08:40:00Z",
  },
];

export const ALERTS = [
  {
    id: "a1",
    type: "critical",
    message: "Zone Z2 medical capacity at 98% — deploy reinforcements immediately",
    zone: "z2",
    timestamp: "2025-06-11T09:18:00Z",
    acknowledged: false,
  },
  {
    id: "a2",
    type: "warning",
    message: "Food supply for Zone Z1 delayed by 2 hours due to road blockage",
    zone: "z1",
    timestamp: "2025-06-11T09:10:00Z",
    acknowledged: false,
  },
  {
    id: "a3",
    type: "info",
    message: "Rescue Team Foxtrot reporting 38/40 survivors recovered in Zone Z2",
    zone: "z2",
    timestamp: "2025-06-11T09:05:00Z",
    acknowledged: true,
  },
  {
    id: "a4",
    type: "warning",
    message: "Zone Z3 fire lines shifting — update evacuation corridors",
    zone: "z3",
    timestamp: "2025-06-11T08:55:00Z",
    acknowledged: false,
  },
  {
    id: "a5",
    type: "info",
    message: "Water Supply Unit G available for deployment at Base Camp",
    zone: null,
    timestamp: "2025-06-11T08:30:00Z",
    acknowledged: true,
  },
];

export const ALLOCATION_TIMELINE = [
  { time: "04:00", medical: 1, rescue: 0, food: 0, shelter: 0 },
  { time: "05:00", medical: 2, rescue: 1, food: 0, shelter: 0 },
  { time: "06:00", medical: 2, rescue: 2, food: 1, shelter: 1 },
  { time: "07:00", medical: 3, rescue: 3, food: 2, shelter: 2 },
  { time: "08:00", medical: 4, rescue: 4, food: 3, shelter: 3 },
  { time: "09:00", medical: 4, rescue: 5, food: 3, shelter: 4 },
  { time: "09:20", medical: 4, rescue: 5, food: 3, shelter: 4 },
];

export const ZONE_NEED_SCORES = [
  { zone: "Z1 Flood", score: 76, priority: 2 },
  { zone: "Z2 EQ", score: 80, priority: 1 },
  { zone: "Z3 Fire", score: 56, priority: 3 },
  { zone: "Z4 Storm", score: 43, priority: 4 },
  { zone: "Z5 Drought", score: 29, priority: 5 },
];
